name: Kinetic
description: Cinematic, motion-rich template for design-engineers who want their portfolio to feel premium. Floating-pill nav, BlurText word reveal in the hero, italic-serif accent words, liquid-glass anchor stat, partners marquee, magnetic project cards. Dark by default with a 1 KB theme toggle. Closest references: Velorah, Aethera, generic cinematic-streaming heroes.
audience: Senior design-engineers, product builders, agency leads, anyone who treats their portfolio as a piece of work in itself
inspiration: motionsites.ai (Velorah, Aethera, cinematic streaming), brittanychiang.com (italic-serif accent), Mindloop (mono accent words)
